prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类/理科最低位次约 18740→14802→16938→36656→15224，2024 年出现异常大幅后移（可能与当年省控线大幅提高有关），2025 年回落至约 15224 名，近 2 年波动剧烈，2025 年为基准位次；本省理科/物理类计划 2021 年 39 人、2022 年 38 人、2023 年 38 人、2024 年 41 人、2025 年 44 人，逐年小幅扩招；2026 年计划 50 人，较 2025 年扩招 6 人（+13.6%），扩招幅度较大，理论上会拉低位次门槛（位次数字增大）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名近年持续上升：2021 年约第 103 名→2022 年 85→2023 年 83→2024 年 83→2025 年 61→2026 年 63，排名跃升明显，反映学校综合实力和认可度提升，对报考热度有正向拉动；2026 年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及 2025 年录取季在河北、河南等省份位次下滑超 500 名、中医学专业在东北省份出现断档的滞后舆情；抖音热度排名第 103（一般），短视频曝光量偏低，未形成明显报考助推；该校以中医学、中药学、针灸推拿学为传统优势方向，在中 医药领域具有行业标杆地位。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 中医学、临床医学、口腔医学等医学大类专业热度持续高热（2024–2026 年均为推荐/高热推荐），中医药行业受政策扶持，报考意愿总体偏强；本省物理类考生数从 2025 年 172468 增至 2026 年 206500（+19.7%），竞争基数显著扩大；该校位于北京，对陕西考生有较强跨省吸引力。 综合 2025 年基准位次 15224 名、2026 年大幅扩招 13.6%（拉低位次门槛）、软科排名持续上升（增强报考意愿）、本省物理类考生增加约 19.7%（加剧竞争）、声誉偏负面（轻微抑制热度）等多重因素，供需弹性主值指向约 16469 名，再结合考生规模扩大和排名上升的正向拉力做小幅修正，预测 2026 年最低位次约 16500 名，区间 16000–17000 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category/Science was approximately 18740→14802→16938→36656→15224. In 2024, there was an abnormal large backward shift (possibly related to a significant increase in the provincial control score line that year). In 2025, it fell back to about 15224, with drastic fluctuations in the past 2 years; 2025 serves as the baseline ranking. The provincial Science/Physics Category enrollment plan was 39 in 2021, 38 in 2022, 38 in 2023, 41 in 2024, and 44 in 2025, with a gradual small expansion each year. The 2026 plan is 50, an increase of 6 students (+13.6%) compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, which theoretically will lower the ranking threshold (increase the ranking number).

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has been rising in recent years: approximately 103rd in 2021→85th in 2022→83rd in 2023→83rd in 2024→61st in 2025→63rd in 2026, with a significant jump in ranking, reflecting the improvement of the school's comprehensive strength and recognition, which positively influences application enthusiasm. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving a drop of over 500 places in rankings in Hebei, Henan and other provinces during the 2025 admission season, and a gap in the Chinese Medicine major in northeastern provinces. The Douyin popularity ranking is 103rd (average), with low short video exposure, not forming a significant boost to applications. The university has traditional strengths in Chinese Medicine, Chinese Materia Medica, and Acupuncture and Tuina, holding an industry benchmark position in the field of Chinese medicine.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors such as Chinese Medicine, Clinical Medicine, and Stomatology continue to be highly popular (recommended/highly recommended from 2024 to 2026). The Chinese medicine industry benefits from policy support, and the willingness to apply is generally strong. The number of Physics Category examinees in the province increased from 172,468 in 2025 to 206,500 in 2026 (+19.7%), significantly expanding the competition base. The university is located in Beijing, which has a strong cross-provincial appeal to Shaanxi examinees. Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 15,224, the significant 13.6% expansion in 2026 (lowering the ranking threshold), the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking (enhancing application willingness), the approximately 19.7% increase in provincial Physics Category examinees (intensifying competition), and the negative reputation (slightly suppressing enthusiasm), the main value of supply-demand elasticity points to about 16,469. With minor adjustments based on the positive pull of the expanded examinee pool and rising ranking, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 16,500, with a range of 16,000–17,000.

- Chinese Medicine (Excellent 5+3 Integrated Program).

- Public Administration (Health Management Direction).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 16,500, with a range of 16,000–17,000. If your ranking is within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Chinese Medicine Five-Year Program, Acupuncture and Tuina, Chinese Materia Medica, etc.). For Tier 1 majors (Leading Talent/Hua Tuo Class/Excellent 5+3), you need a ranking significantly better than the lower limit of the range to attempt. Tier 3 majors (Nursing, Pharmaceutical Administration, Big Data Management, etc.) can be used as safety choices. Chinese medicine-related majors generally have high social popularity and intense competition. It is recommended to combine personal interests and career planning for a reasonable mix.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 1142→1513→1596→3124→2551, showing an overall backward trend. In 2024, it significantly shifted backward to 3124, then slightly recovered to 2551 in 2025, with large fluctuations. 2025 serves as the baseline ranking. The provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 3 in 2021, and remained stable at 4 from 2022 to 2025. In 2026, the plan is 5, an increase of 1 (+25%) compared to 2025, a significant expansion that theoretically lowers the ranking threshold (ranking number increases).

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking has been rising in recent years: approximately 103rd in 2021→85th in 2022→83rd in 2023→83rd in 2024→61st in 2025→63rd in 2026, with a clear upward leap, positively influencing application enthusiasm. In 2026, reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving lagging negative public opinion from ranking declines in some provinces during the 2025 admission season. Douyin popularity ranking is 103rd (average), not forming a significant boost to applications. The university is centered on traditional Chinese medicine, but the history category enrollment majors (acupuncture and tuina, law, English, public affairs management) are all non-core medical majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among history category enrollment majors, law popularity is divided and wait-and-see, English/foreign language popularity is generally wait-and-see, public management popularity is clearly discouraging, overall major appeal is weak. The number of provincial history category examinees increased from 75,641 in 2025 to 88,500 in 2026 (+17%), expanding the competition base. The university is located in Beijing, which has strong cross-provincial appeal for Shaanxi examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 2551, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 25% (lowering the ranking threshold), the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking (enhancing application willingness), the approximately 17% increase in provincial history category examinees (intensifying competition), and the overall low popularity of history category enrollment majors, the supply-demand elasticity main value points to approximately 2934. With a minor adjustment for the expanded examinee pool, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 2950, with a range of 2450–3450.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Acupuncture and Tuina (Five-Year)
- Law (Medical and Health Direction).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Public Affairs Management (Health Management Direction).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 2950, range 2450–3450. There are only 4 history category enrollment majors, offering limited choices. Within the ranking range, it is recommended to target Acupuncture and Tuina as the main goal, Law (Medical and Health) as a reach option, English (Medical) as a medium safe option, and Public Affairs Management as a safety. History category examinees applying to this university should note the narrow selection of majors and position themselves reasonably based on the ranking range.
